summary: Re-verification of HotelsResults.jsx Sort + ViewMode migration (the single regression flagged in iter 258). After main agent E1 swapped the legacy Radix <Select> at L862 for <FilterChipSelect> and added an inline <ViewModeToggle>, the page now matches the other 8 service-results pages. All 5 spec checks pass at runtime on the deployed Vite preview bundle (dist mtime 23:26, source mtime 23:25 — fresh build).

verified_observations.build_freshness: dist/index.html 23:26 > HotelsResults.jsx 23:25 — bundle is post-fix and live
verified_observations.source_confirmation: HotelsResults.jsx L862-874: <FilterChipSelect icon={SlidersHorizontal} label='Sort' value={sortBy} onChange={setSortBy} options=[4 sort options] allValue='rating' />; L877: <ViewModeToggle value={viewMode} onChange={setViewMode} />

critical_code_review_comments: HotelsResults.jsx L9 still imports `Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue` from '@/components/ui/select' but no <Select> is rendered on this page anymore — should be removed to satisfy no-unused-vars and shrink the bundle. Cosmetic only; does not affect functionality.

success_rate.frontend: 5/5 spec checks pass (filter-sort chip, view-mode-toggle + 3 view modes, 0 comboboxes, 4 sort options with correct labels)

test_credentials: customer@test.com / testpassword123 (2-step login: click 'Login to Your Account' → email → password).
context_for_next_testing_agent: HotelsResults.jsx migration to FilterChipSelect + ViewModeToggle is now complete and verified. The legacy Radix <Select> import at L9 is unused and can be cleaned up (low priority). All 9 service-results pages now use the shared chip/toggle controls consistently.
rca of the issue: N/A — bug from iter 258 is fixed. Main agent E1 correctly replaced the JSX block at L862-872 with <FilterChipSelect> (4 sort options matching spec) and inserted <ViewModeToggle value={viewMode} onChange={setViewMode}/> at L877. Deployment via supervisorctl restart frontend produced a fresh dist build that serves the new code.
